nasb.text: When the king heard the words of the woman, he tore his clothes—now he was passing by on the wall—and the people looked, and behold, he had sackcloth beneath on his body.

esv.text: When the king heard the words of the woman, he tore his clothes—now he was passing by on the wall—and the people looked, and behold, he had sackcloth beneath on his body—

cnv.text: 王聽見那婦人的話，就撕裂衣服，他當時正在城牆上，人民都看見他；看哪，他裡面貼身穿著的是件麻衣。

ccb.text: 王听了妇人的话，就撕裂衣服。王走在城墙上，人们都看见他贴身穿着麻衣。
